words.def: a perceptible indication of something not immediately apparent (as a visible clue that something has happened)

words.zh: n. 反對者, 反對論者

words.def: the branch of engineering that deals with the use of computers and telecommunications to retrieve and store and transmit information

the state of matter distinguished from the solid and liquid states by: relatively low density and viscosity; relatively great expansion and contraction with changes in pressure and temperature; the ability to diffuse readily; and the spontaneous tendency to become distributed uniformly throughout any container
words.zh: n. 氣體, 汽油, 瓦斯
vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落
